metadata.narrative: ECS (Index of Dispersion of inter-edit gaps) was evaluated against Jaccard 5-gram similarity on 600 near-duplicate vs hard-negative Wikipedia pairs. (1) AUC improvement: Jaccard=1.000, Jaccard+ECS=0.118, delta=-0.882 (95% CI [-0.909,-0.854]) → DISCONFIRMED. (2) ECS-alone AUC=0.106 → DISCONFIRMED. (3) Median IoD ratio=0.25 (ndup=15.077, hneg=59.667), Mann-Whitney p=1.000e+00, Cohen's d=-0.83 → DISCONFIRMED. Precision at 80% recall: Jaccard=1.000, Combined=0.454 (gain=-0.546). Overall: DISCONFIRMED.
